---
title: "{{< var title >}}"
author:
  - name: "{{< var author >}}"
  - name: "{{< var author2 >}}"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y %b %d')`"
format:
  pptx:
    reference-doc: proteoDA_template.pptx
---

## Overview of Project

```{r, results='asis'}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

.libPaths(c("~/R/proteoDA_test_lib", .libPaths()))
library(proteoDA)
source("proteoDA_params.R")

check_file <- function(path, label = NULL) {
  if (is.null(label)) label <- path
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("Missing file: ", path, call. = FALSE)
  path
}

results_file   <- check_file(file.path(working_dir, "results.rds"), "results file")
contrasts_file <- check_file(contrasts, "contrasts file")

results <- readRDS(results_file)
contrast_table <- read.csv(contrasts, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = FALSE)

num_prot_samples <- dim(results$data)
num_prot <- num_prot_samples[1]
num_samples <- num_prot_samples[2]

comparisons <- trimws(sub("=.*", "", contrast_table[[1]]))

cat(paste0("- **Number of samples** = ", num_samples, "\n"))
cat(paste0("- **Number of quantified proteins** = ", num_prot, "\n"))
cat("- **Comparisons:**\n")
cat(paste0("  - ", comparisons, collapse = "\n"))
cat("\n")
```

## Total Protein Intensities

![](QC_report/Barplot_allsamples.png)

## Total Protein Intensities split by group

![](QC_report/Barplot_split_allsamples.png)

## Principal Component Analysis PC1 and PC2

![](QC_report/PCA_PC12.png)

## Principal Component Analysis PC3 and PC4

![](QC_report/PCA_PC34.png)

## Clustered Dendrogram 

![](QC_report/Dendrogram_byGroup.png)

## Proteins with Missing Values

![](QC_report/Heatmap_MissingVal_allsamples.png)

## Differential Abundance Summary

```{r DAsummary}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warnings: false
#| results: 'asis'

source("proteoDA_params.R")
# DiaNN quan output
setwd(working_dir)

DA_sum <- read.csv(file=file.path(DA_dir, "DA_summary.csv"))
knitr::kable(DA_sum, format = "pandoc")

``` 



```{r , include = FALSE}

source("proteoDA_params.R")
# DiaNN quan output
setwd(working_dir)

myplots1 <- list()
for (i in 1:length(results$results)){
  png_file <- file.path(names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-adjusted-pval", fsep="")
  png_file2 <- file.path(DA_dir, "static_plots", png_file, fsep = "/")
  png_file3 <- file.path(png_file2, ".png", fsep="")  
  
 #png_file3 <- file.path(DA_dir, "static_plots", names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-adjusted-pval", "_1.png")
  #print(png_file2)
  print(png_file3)
  
  myplots1 <- append(myplots1, png_file3)
  
  
 #knitr::include_graphics(png_file3)
}
#myplots <- noquote(myplots)
print(myplots1)

index1 <- 1:length(myplots1)

```


```{r Vol_adjusted, include = TRUE}
#| output: asis

res <- purrr::map_chr(index1, \(index1) {
  knitr::knit_child(text = c(
    "## Volcano Plots - Adjusted p-values",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "![](`r as.character(myplots1[index1])`)",
    ""), envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
    })

#res <- knitr::knit_child(text = src, quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = '\n')
```



```{r, include = FALSE}
myplots <- list()
for (i in 1:length(results$results)){
  png_file <- file.path(names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-raw-pval", fsep="")
  png_file2 <- file.path(DA_dir, "static_plots", png_file, fsep = "/")
  png_file3 <- file.path(png_file2, ".png", fsep="")  
  #print(png_file2)
  print(png_file3)
  
  myplots <- append(myplots, png_file3)
  
  
 #knitr::include_graphics(png_file3)
}
#myplots <- noquote(myplots)
#print(myplots)
index <- 1:length(myplots)

```

```{r vol_raw, include = TRUE}
#| output: asis

res <- purrr::map_chr(index, \(index) {
  knitr::knit_child(text = c(
    "## Volcano Plots - unadjusted p-values",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "![](`r as.character(myplots[index])`)",
    ""), envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
    })

#res <- knitr::knit_child(text = src, quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = '\n')
```
